posts.author: slovak82 (Rostyslav )
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings, friends!

Today, our organization faced some troubles with new “Search Feature” release.

We have big bords with 200 or more columns, and usually our staff find the needed data by search field.
Now it shows that we have to choose filters (up to 20 only), but we have a lot of columns (more than 20), and it breaks our workflow. Is it possible to bulk select all the columns? Or just back up to the previous search feature version?
